commit_message:
[TritonCTS] Updated function to find clock nets [TritonCTS] Updated function to find clock nets This is the continuation of PR #280.

The description of the last PR was:

> [PR for Review!!!]
This changes how clocks are loaded into TritonCTS.
First, we create a set and use dbSta's findClkNets function. After that, we insert all clocks from the user inputs (if there are any and if they aren't already in the set.)
After that, we create the Clock objects inside TritonCTS for the nets that ha
